mapper.insert: INSERT INTO web_search_run ( id, tool_invocation_id, job_id, task_id, task_run_id, loop_run_id, loop_node_id, query_text, recency_days, domains_json, locale, result_count ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{toolInvocationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{queryText}, #{recencyDays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CAST(#{domainsJson} AS JSON), #{locale}, #{resultCount} )

INSERT INTO web_search_candidate ( id, search_run_id, tool_invocation_id, job_id, task_id, task_run_id, loop_run_id, loop_node_id, rank_no, title, url, snippet, provider, source_type, published_at ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{searchRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{toolInvocationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{rankNo}, #{title}, #{url}, #{snippet}, #{provider}, #{sourceType}, #{publishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

INSERT INTO web_source_document ( id, tool_invocation_id, job_id, task_id, task_run_id, loop_run_id, loop_node_id, url, title, description, source_type, content_type, content_hash, text_excerpt, fetched_at ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{toolInvocationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{url}, #{title}, #{description}, #{sourceType}, #{contentType}, #{contentHash}, #{textExcerpt}, #{fetchedAt} )

INSERT INTO web_evidence_item ( id, source_document_id, tool_invocation_id, job_id, task_id, task_run_id, loop_run_id, loop_node_id, rank_no, source_url, title, excerpt, relevance_score, source_type ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{sourceDocumentId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{toolInvocationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{rankNo}, #{sourceUrl}, #{title}, #{excerpt}, #{relevanceScore}, #{sourceType} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT search_run.created_at AS occurredAt, 'SEARCH' AS artifactType, search_run.query_text AS title, CONCAT( 'results=', search_run.result_count, CASE WHEN search_run.locale IS NULL OR search_run.locale = '' THEN '' ELSE CONCAT(', locale=', search_run.locale) END ) AS summary, NULL AS url FROM web_search_run search_run WHERE search_run.job_id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} UNION ALL SELECT candidate.created_at AS occurredAt, 'CANDIDATE' AS artifactType, candidate.title AS title, LEFT( REPLACE(REPLACE(candidate.snippet, '\r', ' '), '\n', ' '), 220 ) AS summary, candidate.url AS url FROM web_search_candidate candidate WHERE candidate.job_id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} UNION ALL SELECT source.created_at AS occurredAt, 'SOURCE' AS artifactType, source.title AS title, LEFT(source.text_excerpt, 220) AS summary, source.url AS url FROM web_source_document source WHERE source.job_id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} UNION ALL SELECT evidence.created_at AS occurredAt, 'EVIDENCE' AS artifactType, evidence.title AS title, LEFT( REPLACE(REPLACE(evidence.excerpt, '\r', ' '), '\n', ' '), 260 ) AS summary, evidence.source_url AS url FROM web_evidence_item evidence WHERE evidence.job_id = #{jobId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ) artifact ORDER BY artifact.occurredAt DESC LIMIT #{limit}
